excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: I don't rest on my laurels and I'm always progressing

rigor.title: Rigorous and passionate
rigor.desc: I care about delivering complete and extensible work

autonomy.title: Autonomy and initiative

About.title: About
About.content: Engineer and entrepreneur, I combine full stack & DevOps expertise with strong experience in automation and AI. My goal: transform technology into a business lever and scale ambitious projects.

luphy.title: 2023 – 2025 — CTO & Founder, LUPHY
luphy.summary: Founded and led agency, specializing in automation and AI to accelerate execution and business impact.
bullets: Development of an automated template and email engine for a fundraiser, optimizing the management of roadshows between startups and investors.
Design of an AI-based claims automation system for an insurance company: capacity of +200 files/day, significant reduction in processing times and operational costs.
Realization of an automated sourcing application for strategic information (founders, market, competitors...) with generation of an investment note.

Implementation of a monitoring and scoring tool for investment companies in France (collection of balance sheets, analysis of public data, LinkedIn enrichment), facilitating targeting and effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

ksaar.title: 2021 – 2023 — Senior Full Stack, KSAAR SOLUTIONS
ksaar.summary: Responsible for key technical projects of a high-growth no‑code SaaS platform.
bullets: Development of a no‑code SaaS platform (adopted by +10k users)
Infra design, event-driven architecture, monorepo/TypeScript migration
CI/CD setup, unit tests, integration & load tests
Recruitment and mentoring of junior developers
Creation of an automation platform, Stripe Connect & Yousign integrations

engie.title: 2019 – 2021 — Full Stack Developer, ENGIE‑SOLUTIONS
engie.summary: Development of B2B applications and real-time streams in a demanding industrial environment.
bullets: SCRUM development of a B2B application

excilys.title: 2019 (9 months) — Junior Full Stack, EXCILYS
excilys.summary: First professional experience in an agile team on an internal web application.
bullets: Agile web application to list and share skills

eifer.title: 2017 – 2018 — Data Analyst, EIFER‑EDF
eifer.summary: Analysis of monitoring data to improve operational performance of energy sites.
bullets: Analysis of 5 years of monitoring data
Operational improvement of a dozen micro‑cogeneration units
